task: #src/agent.rs run_tui currently calculates input and output tokens and shows it to the user, can we configure this to work with actual cost also? So essentially we need to know which how much the users configured model costs in #src/config.rs #src/tui/config_view.rs

steps.description: Add cost_per_mtok_output field to Profile, ResolvedConfig structs
steps.instruction:
Add `cost_per_mtok_output: Option<f64>` field to:
- src/config.rs:24 struct Profile (add after cost_per_mtok_input)
- src/config.rs:175 struct ResolvedConfig (add after cost_per_mtok_input)
- Update default() impl and any serialization if needed
[index: `Profile` at line 24 in src/config.rs] — constructed by: DEFAULT_CONFIG_TOML (src/config.rs:281)
[index: `ResolvedConfig` at line 175 in src/config.rs]

steps.description: Add cost_per_mtok_output to AppState and wire from config
steps.instruction:
Add `cost_per_mtok_output: Option<f64>` field to:
- src/tui/mod.rs:363 struct AppState (add after cost_per_mtok_input)
- Update event_loop (src/tui/mod.rs:1056) where AppState is constructed to pass resolved_config.cost_per_mtok_output

steps.description: Add cost display to live stats bar
steps.instruction:
Modify src/tui/render.rs:384-482 draw_stats_bar function:
- Access state.cost_per_mtok_input and state.cost_per_mtok_output
- After token_str line (line 417), add a cost_str similar to stats_view.rs:56-66
- Display estimated cost in the stats bar (e.g., "  $0.023" after token count)
- Use existing cost_str logic or create inline calculation: (input_tok/1M * input_cost) + (output_tok/1M * output_cost)
[index: `draw_stats_bar` at line 379 in src/tui/render.rs]
[index: `bar` at line 17 in src/tui/stats_view.rs]
[index: `cost_str` at line 56 in src/tui/stats_view.rs]

steps.description: Add cost_per_mtok_output to config view display
steps.instruction:

- Show the value or "(not set)" if None
